reviews.covers: Unit 3-4 (short e + short i 前半)
Unit 5-6 (short i 后半 + short o)

appendices.picture_dictionary: p84-88 (24 letters, 缺 Q 和 X)

patterns.title: short a (a, am, an)
patterns.rule: 单词起始的 a 发短元音 /æ/

chants.text: I see an ant and an ax.
The man has a can and a pan.

frames.text: A man with a van is at the dam.
He has a fan, a can, and a yam.
The ants want the yam!
The man puts jam on the yam for the ants.

chants.text: Is that your cap on the map?

frames.text: This is my dad! He has a hat, a bag, and a map.
That is my girl. She has a bat and a cap.
At the house, we use the tap.
Then we take a nap!

patterns.title: short e (e, et, en, ed)
patterns.rule: 单词起始的 e 发短元音 /ɛ/

chants.text: The vet has ten big eggs.
The red pen is on the bed.

frames.text: The red hen is wet.
Oh, no! My pet hen is in bed.
We go to the vet.
My hen has ten eggs!

patterns.title: short i (i, ip, ib, id)
patterns.rule: 单词起始或闭音节的 i 发短元音 /ɪ/

chants.text: I like to sip with my lips.

frames.text: The kid can use ink.
He can open a lid.
He can sip and zip.
This kid needs a bib!

chants.text: Can you see a pin in the bin?

frames.text: Help! My fin is in a net!
I can rip it with this pin.
I can hit. I can dig under the net.
Thank you! Now I can win!

patterns.title: short o (o, ot, op)
patterns.rule: 单词起始的 o 发短元音 /ɒ/

chants.text: The hot pot is under the cot.

frames.text: The fox has a hot pot.
He stands on a log and uses a rod.
The fish hops. It doesn't like the rod!
The fox hops, too. He gets wet!

patterns.title: short u (u, ug, ud, up)
patterns.rule: 单词起始的 u 发短元音 /ʌ/

chants.text: A pup sees a bud in the mud.

frames.text: There is some mud. The mud is sad.
A pup digs in the mud.
A bug puts a pit in the mud.
The sun comes up. It is a bud! Now the mud is happy.

chants.text: The cub can hum in the tub.

frames.text: The cub and the pup are friends. They live in a hut.
Cub: I like to make buns. Pup: I like to run for fun!
The cub hums and cuts nuts.
Pup: I like buns, too! Yum!

song.title: Bag, map, ax, cap...
song.lyrics: Bag, map, ax, cap, fan, can, pan. A girl with a bag, A man with a map, A ram with an ax, A yak with a cap, A rat with a fan, A cat with a can, And a small ant with a pan.

lines.text: Bag, map, ax, cap, fan, can, pan.
A girl with a bag, A man with a map, A ram with an ax, A yak with a cap, A rat with a fan, A cat with a can, And a small ant with a pan.

song.title: The pet needs a vet...
song.lyrics: The pet needs a vet. The egg needs a box. The can needs a lid. And Dad needs socks. The kid needs a sip. The hen needs a jet. The pen needs ink. And she needs a net.

song.title: In, on, under...
song.lyrics: In, on, under. In, on, under. A mop in a bin, A pin on a hat, And six logs under a pot. A big fish in a net, A dog on a mat, And six kids under a cot.

lines.text: A mop in a bin, A pin on a hat, And six logs under a pot.
A big fish in a net, A dog on a mat, And six kids under a cot.

song.title: Friends, friends...
song.lyrics: Friends, friends, A pup and a cub. They live in a hut, And they make some buns. Yum, yum, yum! Friends, friends, A pup and a cub. They put a bug On a red rug. Run, run, run! Friends, friends, A pup and a cub. They go in a tub Under the sun. Fun, fun, fun!

lines.text: Friends, friends, A pup and a cub.
They live in a hut, And they make some buns.
Friends, friends, A pup and a cub.
They put a bug On a red rug.
Friends, friends, A pup and a cub.
They go in a tub Under the sun.

The cub hums and cuts nuts.

1: I see an ant and an ax.
The man has a can and a pan.
2: Is that your cap on the map?
3: The vet has ten big eggs.
The red pen is on the bed.
4: I like to sip with my lips.
5: Can you see a pin in the bin?
6: The hot pot is under the cot.
7: A pup sees a bud in the mud.
8: The cub can hum in the tub.

class_instructions: Listen and circle the ones that rhyme.

prompt_slices.compact:
OPW2 Level 2 Short Vowels. Use only teacher input plus the in-scope items below for expansions.
Unit 1 short a (a, am, an) pages 4-11: a: cat, ant, yak, ax | am: ram, jam, yam, dam | an: fan, man, pan, can; sight: with, at, puts, on, for; story: Ants.
Unit 2 short a (ad, ag, ap, at) pages 12-19: ad: dad, pad | ag: bag, rag | ap: cap, map, nap, tap | at: bat, rat, hat, mat; sight: day, girl, she, we, use, then, take; story: A Day with Dad.
Unit 3 short e (e, et, en, ed) pages 24-31: e: web, egg, vet, ten | et: jet, net, wet, pet | en: hen, pen | ed: red, bed; sight: oh, in, go, to; story: My Pet Hen.
Unit 4 short i (i, ip, ib, id) pages 32-39: i: hip, ink, zip, in | ip: lip, tip, sip, rip | ib: bib, rib | id: kid, lid; sight: can, open, needs; story: The Kid.
Unit 5 short i (in, ig, it, ix) pages 44-51: in: pin, fin, bin, win | ig: fig, wig, big, dig | it: pit, hit | ix: six, mix; sight: help, under, thank, now; story: Help!.
Unit 6 short o (o, ot, op) pages 52-59: o: fox, log, ox, rod | ot: pot, hot, cot, dot | op: top, mop, hop, pop; sight: stands, doesn't, too, gets; story: The Fox.
Unit 7 short u (u, ug, ud, up) pages 64-71: u: sun, up, jug, hug | ug: bug, rug, mug | ud: bud, mud | up: pup, cup; sight: there, some, sad, comes, happy; story: The Mud.
Unit 8 short u (ut, ub, um, un) pages 72-79: ut: nut, hut, cut | ub: cub, tub | um: gum, hum | un: bun, run, fun; sight: are, friends, they, live, make, yum; story: Friends.
Review 1 pages 20-23: Unit 1-2 (short a); song: Bag, map, ax, cap....
Review 2 pages 40-43: Unit 3-4; song: The pet needs a vet....
Review 3 pages 60-63: Unit 5-6; song: In, on, under....
Review 4 pages 80-83: Unit 7-8; song: Friends, friends....
